data.summary_suggestion: Create a new inventory listing for sale
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new inventory listing for an event or product. Requires authentication via Bearer token. Accepts listing details including product information, pricing, and quantity through the CreateListingRequest schema. Returns a ListingResponse containing the created listing ID and confirmation details. The listing becomes immediately available in the seller's inventory upon successful creation.

message: Operation 'createWebhookSubscription' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, unclear_purpose, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is generic and description is missing entirely. Improved version clarifies the subscription purpose (event notifications), specifies authentication requirement, explains what inputs are needed (endpoint URL, event types), describes the response (subscription ID), and clarifies the side effect (webhook becomes active). Adds domain context about StubHub and uses consistent terminology with the Webhooks tag. Helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.description_suggestion: Registers a webhook subscription to receive event notifications from StubHub. Requires authentication via Bearer token. Accepts subscription configuration including the webhook endpoint URL and event types through the WebhookSubscriptionRequest schema. Returns a WebhookSubscriptionResponse containing the subscription ID and confirmation details. Once created, the webhook will begin receiving notifications for the specified events.
